entry.desc: Switch to turn on heterogeneous freezing by classical nucleation theory. Currently a stub in CAM-SIMA: the flag is propagated to downstream schemes (nucleate_ice_ccpp, eventually PUMAS) but no hetfrz computation is performed. Setting this to TRUE is supported for snapshot-testing flows where the flag must match CAM; a warning is emitted at init time. Default: FALSE; TRUE for CAM6 and CAM7.
